name: Mcmillan Shakespeare Limited
analysis: MMS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.6500, stop A$18.0081, target A$24.5757 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
